title: If and Workday FOrmula

posts.author: Reindeer2020 (Felix)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I appear to have an issue with the forms and text columns. We enter data by using a form, however the data inserted into a text column doesn’t appear in the task afterwards.

Does anyone know what I am doing wrong? I literally only created a short text column and then a form, but the data just doesn’t show in the column.

Thanks =)
